name: submit_timesheet
description: Submit time tracking entries for a contractor or employee. Records hours worked against a contract for a given date range. Timesheets feed into invoicing and payroll calculations.

parameters.name: contract_id
parameters.description: The ID of the contract to submit time against.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Start date of the time period (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: End date of the time period (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of work performed during this period.
